# Support

## Where to get help

1. **Read the docs** — start with [`README.md`](../README.md) and [`docs/architecture.md`](architecture.md). Most "why isn't this working" questions are answered there.
2. **Search existing issues** — <https://github.com/Akichoooo/subclaw/issues?q=is%3Aissue>. Your question may already be answered.
3. **Open a discussion** — <https://github.com/Akichoooo/subclaw/discussions>. Best for "how do I…" questions that aren't a bug.
4. **File an issue** — <https://github.com/Akichoooo/subclaw/issues/new>. Best for confirmed bugs.

## What this repo does NOT support

- **Real-time chat / Discord / Slack.** We do not maintain one. If you want community chat, use the GitHub Discussions forum.
- **Custom feature development for individual users.** subclaw is open source. You're welcome to fork it. We won't write custom code for free.
- **Free consulting on your specific setup.** If you have a complicated deployment, you can hire the author — see [FUNDING.yml](FUNDING.yml) for contact options.

## Response time expectations

This is a one-person-maintained project (Akichoooo). Expect:

- Bug reports: 1-3 days for first response
- Feature requests: 1-2 weeks for first response
- Security reports: 72 hours for first response (per the [security policy](SECURITY.md))

If your issue is urgent (production down, money burning), say so in the title with `[URGENT]` and we'll prioritize.

## Commercial support

If you need a guaranteed SLA, a custom feature, or on-call support, contact the maintainer via the email in the GitHub profile. We do not currently offer a commercial plan; rates are negotiable case-by-case.

## Sponsoring

If subclaw has saved you money, consider [sponsoring development](FUNDING.yml). Recurring sponsorships get priority support and roadmap influence.
